0427_Shades_of_Gray_01_00_38_00.title: Shades of Gray
0427_Shades_of_Gray_01_00_38_00.description:
Portrays various mental disorders suffered by soldiers during training and combat and their treatment.

01:00:38:19  Soldier in dirty uniform, with scruffy face still wearing helmet from battle seated across table from clean army officer asking about how he feels; soldiers is trembling in shock; CU soldier shaking in terror says “all mixed up in my head, I sort of lost control.” Clean cut soldier gives trembling soldier a cigarette and lights it for him; man tries to comfort the soldier in shock
0427_Shades_of_Gray_01_00_38_00.creator: U.S. Army
